title: CARE PROGRAM - 211info
text: NORTH CLACKAMAS SCHOOL DISTRICT CARE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program offers a variety of activities, games, and snacks. 6031 SE King Road Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Children K-5 Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-8:30am and 2pm-6pm, closed federal holidays Non-School days: 8am-6pm, closed federal holidays Email (503) 353-6091 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 353-6091 Main phone Main phone (503) 353-6091 Alternate (503) 353-6094 Natalie Whisler Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: North Clackamas School District SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: After School Meal Programs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
